categories.label: Response Playbooks
categories.description: Automated incident-response workflows triggered by alerts or manual invocation.

categories.label: Detection Rules
categories.description: Curated YAML rules for identifying malicious or suspicious activity across cloud, identity, endpoint, network, application, and data-exfil categories.

categories.label: Plugins
categories.description: Reference connectors, enrichers, actions, and widgets shipped with both Python and Go SDK implementations for cross-language parity.

items.name: SQL Injection Attempt in HTTP Query
items.description: Detects HTTP requests containing common SQL injection payload patterns in query strings or POST bodies. Strong indicator of automated probing or active exploitation against web applications.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Cross-Site Scripting Attempt
items.description: AiSOC v1 curated detection. Triggers on the application signal described by 'Cross-Site Scripting Attempt'. Watch the 1 documented false-positive case before tuning.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: AWS Root Account Console Login
items.description: Detects any console sign-in event using the AWS root account. Root account usage outside of initial setup or emergency break-glass scenarios should trigger immediate investigation. Best practice requires MFA on the root account.

items.name: LOLBAS Binary Used for Download or Execution
items.description: Detects living-off-the-land binaries (LOLBAS) being used to download payloads or execute remote code. These binaries are commonly abused by attackers because they are signed by Microsoft and bypass simple application whitelisting.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: LSASS Memory Read by Untrusted Process
items.description: Detects when a process reads LSASS memory with access masks consistent with credential extraction (Mimikatz-style). LSASS holds plaintext password hashes and Kerberos tickets in memory; access from anything other than allowlisted security software is a strong compromise indicator.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Mass File Extension Rename Indicative of Ransomware
items.description: Detects bulk file rename operations where file extensions are changed to novel patterns within a short time window. This is a high-fidelity indicator of ransomware encryption activity.
items.author: AiSOC

items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Authentication Brute-Force Burst
items.description: Detects high-frequency failed authentication attempts against a single account, which is a classic indicator of credential-stuffing or password-spraying attempts. Threshold is intentionally conservative to reduce noise.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Impossible Travel Between Two Authentications
items.description: Detects two successful authentication events for the same user from geographically distant locations within a time window that would require travel speeds exceeding 800 km/h. Strong indicator of compromised credentials being shared between attacker and legitimate user.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Password Spray Across Many Users from Single IP
items.description: AiSOC v1 curated detection. Triggers on the identity signal described by 'Password Spray Across Many Users from Single IP'. Watch the 1 documented false-positive case before tuning.
items.author: AiSOC

items.description: AiSOC v1 curated detection. Triggers on the identity signal described by 'Cross-Tenant Identity Access Granted'. Watch the 1 documented false-positive case before tuning.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: C2 Beacon Pattern (Periodic High-Frequency)
items.description: Detects highly periodic outbound network connections to a single destination, characteristic of command-and-control (C2) beaconing from implants. Combines both connection count and interval consistency to reduce false positives from telemetry agents.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: DNS Tunneling / Exfiltration (High Length Subdomains)
items.description: Detects DNS tunnelling activity characterised by abnormally long subdomain labels and high query volume to a single parent domain. Common technique for covert data exfiltration that bypasses egress filtering on standard ports.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Internal Network Port Scan
items.description: Detects horizontal and vertical port scanning activity originating from inside the network. Often the first sign of an attacker performing reconnaissance after gaining initial foothold.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: SSH Brute-Force From Internet
items.description: AiSOC v1 curated detection. Triggers on the network signal described by 'SSH Brute-Force From Internet'. Watch the 1 documented false-positive case before tuning.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: SMB Lateral Movement (Many ADMIN$ Connections)
items.description: AiSOC v1 curated detection. Triggers on the network signal described by 'SMB Lateral Movement (Many ADMIN$ Connections)'. Watch the 1 documented false-positive case before tuning.
items.author: AiSOC

items.description: AiSOC v1 curated detection. Triggers on the network signal described by 'RDP From Internet to Internal Host'. Watch the 1 documented false-positive case before tuning.

items.description: AiSOC v1 curated detection. Triggers on the network signal described by 'DNS-over-HTTPS to Non-Approved Resolver'. Watch the 1 documented false-positive case before tuning.

items.description: AiSOC v1 curated detection. Triggers on the network signal described by 'Peer-to-Peer Protocol on Corporate Network'. Watch the 1 documented false-positive case before tuning.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Kerberos Encryption Downgrade to RC4
items.description: AiSOC v1 curated detection. Triggers on the network signal described by 'Kerberos Encryption Downgrade to RC4'. Watch the 1 documented false-positive case before tuning.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: WMI Remote Process Creation From Workstation
items.description: AiSOC v1 curated detection. Triggers on the network signal described by 'WMI Remote Process Creation From Workstation'. Watch the 1 documented false-positive case before tuning.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: ATO: Credential Stuffing — Block & Reset
items.description: Triggered by high-volume failed logins from a single source. Blocks the IP range, identifies impacted users, and forces resets.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: ATO: Impossible Travel — Block & Reset
items.description: Triggered by impossible-travel detections. Blocks the source IP, force-revokes active sessions for the user, and requires human approval before forcing a password reset.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: ATO: MFA Fatigue — Challenge & Reset
items.description: Triggered when a user receives an unusual burst of MFA prompts. Enforces step-up auth and resets MFA factors after approval.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: ATO: Session Token Theft — Revoke & Isolate
items.description: Triggered when an authenticated session is observed from a new device + new geo simultaneously. Revokes all tokens and isolates the originating endpoint if known.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: ATO: Suspicious OAuth Grant — Revoke & Investigate
items.description: Triggered when a user grants a new OAuth scope to an unfamiliar third-party app. Revokes the grant and investigates.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: BEC: Conditional Access Policy Bypass
items.description: Triggered when a BEC-related sign-in succeeds from a region that should be blocked by Conditional Access. Restores policy.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: BEC: Impersonation Domain Quarantine
items.description: Triggered when an inbound email originates from a domain that look-alikes an executive or vendor. Quarantines and blocks.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: BEC: Malicious Inbox Rule Removed
items.description: Triggered when a forwarding/filter rule is created that hides vendor or finance keywords. Removes the rule and resets creds.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: BEC: M365 / Workspace Token Theft
items.description: Triggered when a refresh token is observed from a new ASN with no interactive sign-in. Revokes refresh tokens and forces MFA.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: BEC: Vendor Payment Redirect — Freeze
items.description: Triggered when a vendor banking detail change happens via email. Freezes pending payments and pages CFO.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Cloud: Azure Blob Container Public
items.description: Triggered when an Azure Storage container is set to public. Reverts to private and audits.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Cloud: CloudTrail Disabled — Re-enable
items.description: Triggered when a CloudTrail trail is stopped. Restarts trail and audits API calls in the dark window.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Cloud: Unexpected Cross-Account Trust
items.description: Triggered when a role trust policy adds an external account ID not on the allow-list. Revokes and audits.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Cloud: GKE Cluster Anonymous Auth
items.description: Triggered when GKE cluster is configured to allow anonymous Kubernetes API access. Disables anonymous and audits.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Cloud: Over-Privileged IAM — Detach & Review
items.description: Triggered when IAM Access Analyzer flags an over-privileged role. Detaches the policy and opens an owner-review ticket.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Cloud: Cloud Access Key Leaked
items.description: Triggered when a long-lived access key is found in a public repo or paste site. Rotates the key and scans for downstream use.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Cloud: Root Account MFA Disabled
items.description: Triggered when root MFA is disabled. Re-enables MFA and pages the cloud-platform owner immediately.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Cloud: RDS Instance Publicly Accessible
items.description: Triggered when an RDS instance toggles to publicly accessible. Removes public access and audits.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Cloud: S3 Bucket Public — Re-private & Audit
items.description: Triggered by `s3-public-bucket` detection. Sets bucket private, enables Block Public Access, and audits last 7d access logs.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Cloud: Security Group Opens 0.0.0.0/0
items.description: Triggered when a security group rule allows ingress from 0.0.0.0/0 to a sensitive port. Closes the rule and audits the change.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: DDoS: DNS Amplification
items.description: Triggered when an inbound spike of crafted DNS queries hits an authoritative server. Sinkholes spoofed sources.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: DDoS: Application Layer L7
items.description: Triggered by anomalous L7 request rate or pattern. Engages WAF rate-limit rule and challenge-page.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: DDoS: Auth-Endpoint Credential Stuffing
items.description: Triggered when /login takes a sustained spike of failed attempts. Combines DDoS + credential-stuffing response: WAF challenge, rate-limit, source-IP block.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: DDoS: SYN Flood
items.description: Triggered by SYN flood pattern at edge. Enables SYN cookies and increases backend capacity.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: DDoS: Volumetric L3/L4
items.description: Triggered by volumetric flood detection at edge. Engages scrubbing provider and pages on-call.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Exfil: Archive File Egress (.zip / .7z / .rar)
items.description: Triggered when a host uploads an archive to an external dest. Holds the file in DLP review queue and notifies user's manager.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Exfil: DNS Tunneling
items.description: Triggered by high-entropy DNS query length on a host. Sinkholes the suspect domain and isolates the host.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Exfil: Large Outbound Upload
items.description: Triggered when a host uploads >X GB to a non-corporate destination in a short window. Blocks destination and investigates.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Exfil: Personal Cloud Storage Upload
items.description: Triggered when corporate data uploads to a personal cloud (personal Drive, Dropbox, iCloud). Blocks dest, manager notify.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Exfil: Sensitive Data to Removable Media
items.description: Triggered when a sensitive file is written to a USB volume. Blocks USB writes via EDR policy and opens a ticket.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Insider: Anomalous After-Hours Access
items.description: Triggered when a user accesses sensitive systems outside their normal pattern. Step-up MFA and log for HR review.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Insider: Mass File Download
items.description: Triggered when a single user downloads >N files from a sensitive store in <T window. Reduces user permissions and notifies manager.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Insider: Privilege Misuse
items.description: Triggered when a privileged account performs actions outside its approved JIT window. Revokes privilege and pages HR-Sec.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Insider: Resignation + Sensitive Access
items.description: Triggered when a user with a recent resignation flag accesses sensitive data. Read-only mode and HR audit.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Insider: Source-Code Exfil
items.description: Triggered when a developer pushes private source to a personal remote or pastebin-like target. Blocks dest, pages eng-leadership.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Lateral: Cross-Domain Movement
items.description: Triggered when an account from one trust domain authenticates to an asset in a separately-classified domain in a way that violates policy. Segments the network and investigates.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Lateral: Kerberoasting
items.description: Triggered by abnormal SPN-ticket request volume from a single user. Resets impacted service-account credentials.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Lateral: Pass-The-Hash
items.description: Triggered by NTLM relay / PTH detection. Disables the user and isolates source + destination.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Lateral: PsExec / Remote Service Creation
items.description: Triggered by remote service creation patterns indicative of PsExec / Impacket. Isolates target and source, investigates.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Lateral: RDP Spray
items.description: Triggered when one host opens RDP to >N hosts in <T window. Blocks the source IP, isolates host, investigates.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Ransomware: C2 Beacon Block
items.description: Triggered by C2 beaconing detections that match ransomware-family TTPs. Blocks C2 destinations at edge, isolates source host.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Ransomware: File-Server Encryption Activity
items.description: Triggered by mass-rename / mass-extension-change on a file server. Network-segments the host to halt SMB lateral encryption.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Ransomware: Host Isolation & Snapshot
items.description: Immediate host isolation, disk snapshot for forensics, page on-call. Standard first-response for endpoint ransomware.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Ransomware: Internet-Exposed Asset Containment
items.description: Triggered when a host with public exposure shows ransomware indicators. Pulls the asset off the internet immediately.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Ransomware: Shadow Copy Deletion Detected
items.description: Triggered on `vssadmin delete shadows` or wmic shadowcopy delete. Pre-encryption signal — isolate fast and verify backups.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Supply Chain: GitHub Action Compromise
items.description: Triggered when a referenced GitHub Action SHA changes unexpectedly or matches a compromise advisory. Pin to last-known-good and audit.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Supply Chain: IaC Drift Detected
items.description: Triggered when production infra deviates from IaC source of truth in a security-relevant way. Reverts to declared state.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Supply Chain: Malicious npm Package
items.description: Triggered when a published npm package matches a known-bad list. Blocks installs at registry-mirror, audits org installs.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Supply Chain: PyPI Typosquat
items.description: Triggered when a typosquat package is observed in CI installs. Pulls install lock to canonical name and audits.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Supply Chain: Vendor Breach Notification
items.description: Triggered when a vendor publishes a breach advisory matching internal vendor inventory. Blocks vendor IPs, opens procurement review.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Cloudflare WAF Action
items.description: Cloudflare WAF action plugin. Blocks IPs at the zone or account level, toggles "Under Attack" mode, manages firewall rules, and purges cache via the Cloudflare API. Useful as an inline response step in DDoS, credential stuffing, and bot-attack playbooks.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team

items.name: Datadog Incidents Connector
items.description: Pulls open Datadog incidents and security signals into AiSOC for unified triage. Supports both the Incidents API and the Security Monitoring signals API so AiSOC can mirror infra alerts and security findings side-by-side.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team

items.name: GitHub Audit Log Connector
items.description: GitHub Enterprise / Organization audit log connector. Streams org audit events, lists secret-scanning alerts, and pulls user activity for security investigations. Backed by the GitHub Audit Log API.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team

items.name: GitLab Audit Connector
items.description: Pulls GitLab audit events at the instance, group, or project level. Mirrors the github-audit connector so security teams can monitor access changes, permission grants, secret rotations, and CI configuration changes across both GitHub and GitLab from a single SOC.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team

items.name: Jamf Pro MDM Connector
items.description: Jamf Pro MDM connector for Apple device fleet management. Looks up devices, retrieves compliance posture, locks compromised endpoints, wipes lost devices, and pulls inventory metadata for case enrichment — all via the Jamf Pro Classic and Pro REST APIs.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team

items.name: MTTR Dashboard Widget
items.description: Computes Mean Time to Respond (MTTR) and Mean Time to Detect (MTTD) metrics from closed AiSOC cases, broken down by severity and playbook. Returns structured data ready for the AiSOC dashboard widget renderer.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team

items.name: Notion Incidents Sync
items.description: Syncs AiSOC incidents to a Notion database. Creates a new page per incident with severity, status, MITRE techniques, summary, and a link back to the AiSOC case. Useful for runbook archives and post-mortems.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team

items.name: Okta Connector
items.description: Okta Identity Cloud connector. Looks up users, lists active sessions, suspends/unsuspends accounts, clears MFA factors, and logs out all active sessions for a given user — all via the Okta Management API.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team

items.name: 1Password Events Connector
items.description: Pulls 1Password Business and Enterprise events (sign-in attempts, item usage, and audit events) via the 1Password Events API. Useful for detecting credential theft, anomalous access patterns, and insider misuse of privileged secrets.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team

items.name: PagerDuty Paging
items.description: Pages on-call responders via PagerDuty. Supports trigger / acknowledge / resolve incidents through the Events API v2 and direct API calls for service/escalation lookups.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team

items.name: Slack Quarantine Notifier
items.description: Posts a structured quarantine notification to a Slack channel when a host or user has been isolated during an incident response. Supports rich Block Kit formatting, direct-message escalations to the on-call analyst, and thread-based updates as the incident evolves.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team

items.name: Snowflake Events Connector
items.description: Polls Snowflake account/login/query history from the SNOWFLAKE.ACCOUNT_USAGE schema. Useful for spotting anomalous queries, exfiltration patterns, and access from unexpected regions or service accounts.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team

items.name: Tailscale ACL Action
items.description: Tailscale ACL action plugin. Lists devices, retrieves the current tailnet policy, suspends devices, and pushes ACL updates via the Tailscale API. Useful as an isolation step in account-takeover and lateral-movement playbooks.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team

items.name: Twilio SMS Notifier
items.description: Sends SMS messages via Twilio's REST API. Useful for paging on-call responders, emergency notifications, and out-of-band alerts when email or chat are unavailable.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team

items.name: YARA File Enricher
items.description: Scans a file (supplied as bytes or a local path) against a configurable set of YARA rule files. Returns matching rule names, tags, and metadata so analysts can quickly triage malware indicators.
items.author: AiSOC Core Team
